expectations.text: Response contains [RESULT]...[/RESULT] tags exactly, with nothing before [RESULT] and nothing after [/RESULT]
expectations.evidence: Response is opening [RESULT], one content paragraph, closing [/RESULT]. No surrounding text.

expectations.text: Body inside [RESULT]...[/RESULT] is at most 200 words
expectations.evidence: Body is ~80 words — covers E-entry creation, sub-node fills, Bugs pointer, tags.

expectations.text: Agent writes to project's Bugs section (P0048.6.*) OR creates a new E-entry linked to P0048
expectations.evidence: Created E0166 linked to P0048 AND appended summary at P0048.6.14 (Bugs section). Both conditions met.

expectations.text: The hmem entry mentions HMEM_PATH with spaces (the specific failure condition) and hmem-sync v1.0.1
expectations.evidence: E0166 title quotes 'hmem-sync v1.0.1 fails when HMEM_PATH contains spaces'.

expectations.text: Bug status reflects 'fixed/solved' — via #solved tag, [✓] marker, or solution-text node, not left as an open issue
expectations.evidence: Title carries #solved, dedicated .4 Solution node filled with fix detail, #solved tag in tags array.

expectations.text: Every hmem write carries the tag #eval-i2-subagent-2026-05-15
expectations.evidence: Result lists sentinel tag on E0166 (tags) and on the P0048.6.14 Bugs pointer.
